sentences.english: Describe a movie that inspired or motivated you.
sentences.korean: 영감을 주거나 동기를 부여한 영화를 묘사하세요.

sentences.english: A movie that truly inspired me is The Pursuit of Happyness.
sentences.korean: 진정으로 영감을 준 영화는 행복을 찾아서예요.

sentences.english: It tells the true story of a man who went from being homeless to becoming a successful stockbroker through pure determination.
sentences.korean: 노숙자에서 순수한 결단력으로 성공한 주식 중개인이 된 한 남자의 실화를 다뤄요.

sentences.english: What moved me most was how he never gave up even when he was sleeping in a subway station bathroom with his young son.
sentences.korean: 가장 감동적이었던 것은 어린 아들과 지하철역 화장실에서 잘 때도 절대 포기하지 않았다는 거예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: The Role of Luck in Success
Social Media — More Harm or Good

sentences.english: After watching it I promised myself that I would never complain about minor difficulties in my own life.
sentences.korean: 그것을 보고 나서 내 삶의 사소한 어려움에 대해 불평하지 않겠다고 다짐했어요.

sentences.english: It reminded me that circumstances don't define you — your response to them does.
sentences.korean: 환경이 당신을 정의하는 것이 아니라 그에 대한 반응이 정의한다는 것을 상기시켜줬어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
